name: Unlock Your Love
original_name: รักได้ไหม ยัยตัวร้าย
overview: The pain and disappointment of love drives Rain and Love into each other's orbits. With the assistance of Dean and Pat, Love and Rain are able to get over the barrier erected by Rain's painful past.
